title: OverEngineer'd
description: Filled to the brim with tech mods, inspired by the Tekkit modpacks, to let you OverEngineer anything.
body: This pack is OverEngineer'd to give you several ways to choose from to automate anything! Built on 1.20.1, OverEngineer'd is a Forge modpack inspired by the old Tekkit modpacks that were a staple of Minecraft years ago. Includes: - Ad Astra - Alternate Current - Applied Energistics 2 - CC: Tweaked - Create (+ addons) - Extreme Reactors - Industral Foregoing - Kontrapton - Mekanism suite - PneumaticCraft: Repressurized - RFTools suite - Tesseract - Thermal suite - Valkyrien Skies And more! This pack is a work in progress, and I value any feedback you have on it! https://forms.gle/bqCxjSRPJqNqqi7W8 Happy Engineering! If you post a video of or stream this modpack, please link back to this page! My other modpacks: WitchHazel: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/witchhazel-autumn-magic](https://modrinth.com/modpack/witchhazel-autumn-magic) Like what I make? Want to support my modding endeavours? Alternatively, if you and your friends need a server, you can get 15% off your first month from Kinetic Hosting and help support me if you use my code! https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=852 ![KineticHosting partner banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/012e88aa58e334890e64fcbdf3aa1bb4b11446e1_0.webp)
